name: Sunbelt Pawn Jewelry & Loan #3
description_short: Houston-area pawn chain offering same-day collateral loans, jewelry repair, and FFL firearm transfers across 19 locations in Houston and DFW metro.
description_long:
Sunbelt Pawn Jewelry & Loan was founded in 2006 by a family team out of their first location at 34th St & Ella Blvd in Houston, TX. Nearly two decades later, the chain has grown to 19 locations spanning the Houston metro and Dallas/Fort Worth markets including Irving. Sunbelt positions itself as a dignified alternative in pawnbroking, describing their mission as having "changed the face" of the industry through a commitment to respectful service. The company is not a CDFI, HUD-approved counselor, or NFCC-certified organization — it is a licensed pawnbroker regulated under Texas state pawn law and holds a Federal Firearms License for transfer services.

At its core, Sunbelt Pawn provides collateral-based cash loans: customers bring in items of value, receive an appraised cash offer, and can reclaim their property by repaying the loan plus fees within the state-regulated period. No credit check is required — the loan is secured entirely by the pawned item. Beyond loans, Sunbelt operates as a full-service resale business, buying and selling fine jewelry, authenticated luxury handbags, firearms, musical instruments, audio equipment, electronics, and power tools. In-store jewelry repair is available. The FFL license enables legal firearm transfers. The company also runs an online luxury goods portal and an eBay storefront for remote buyers. Loan amounts, interest rates, and fee structures are not published online — terms are set per transaction under Texas pawnbroker regulations.

Sunbelt's scale is notable for a regional independent chain: 19 locations across two major metro areas provides convenience uncommon for family-owned pawn businesses. Their 5.0-star Google rating across 5,478 reviews is exceptional for any retail financial service. Location #3 at 337 FM 1960 Rd W alone holds over 4,045 Google reviews at a perfect average. Sunbelt also operates a community scholarship program, reflecting genuine local investment. Their authenticated luxury resale segment and online presence elevate them well above the typical neighborhood pawn shop.

Sunbelt Pawn is a legitimate, well-regarded option for Houston-area residents who need immediate cash against a valuable asset — no credit history, income documentation, or lengthy application required. The retail resale side equally serves bargain hunters. The primary limitation is transparency: no loan rates, fee schedules, or interest disclosures appear online, making it impossible to comparison-shop before visiting. Texas Finance Code permits significant fees on short-term pawn loans, meaning effective APRs are typically high relative to conventional credit. The BBB profile was only opened in January 2025 and carries no formal accreditation. Customers who cannot repay forfeit their collateral permanently with no grace period disclosed.
pros: 5.0 Google rating across 5,478 reviews — exceptional consistency for a pawn and resale operation
19 locations spanning Houston and Dallas/Fort Worth metro areas for broad local access
Family-owned since 2006 with nearly 20 years of continuous operation
No credit check required — loans are secured by collateral only, open to all credit profiles
Licensed FFL dealer enabling legal firearm transfer services in-store
Authenticated luxury handbag resale and online/eBay storefront for remote buyers
Same-day cash loans with no application, income verification, or waiting period
cons: No loan rates, fees, or APR disclosures published — must visit in-store to learn actual terms
Pawn loan interest rates are typically high relative to conventional credit under Texas regulations
BBB profile opened January 2025 — too new to carry meaningful accreditation or complaint track record
Defaulting on repayment means permanent forfeiture of pawned item — no grace period published online
No dedicated mobile app for loan tracking or account management
best_for: Houston or DFW residents needing same-day cash without a credit check or income verification
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted jewelry, electronics, luxury goods, or firearms at resale prices
Gun owners needing a licensed FFL dealer for legal firearm transfer services
Sellers wanting to move valuable items quickly through a retail-level service rather than a private sale
diagnosis: Sunbelt Pawn is best suited for Houston and DFW residents who need fast cash against a valuable asset and cannot or do not want to use conventional credit — no application, credit history, or income proof required. It also serves bargain shoppers and firearm buyers needing FFL services across a convenient 19-location footprint. The main caveat is cost opacity: loan rates are not disclosed online, and pawn loans under Texas law carry high effective APRs, making them a short-term emergency tool rather than a low-cost borrowing strategy.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 337 Farm to Market 1960 Rd W, Houston, TX 77090
